_protocol_note: Both agents: read replit.md § 'Agent Collaboration Protocol' for full rules. This file IS the shared state — claims, logs, notes, conflicts all live here.

commandcode_log.summary: Added /api proxy to localhost:8080 so Replit dev preview routes API calls to local API server
Interactive backend architecture map — 27 nodes, 42 edges, 6 clusters, critical RDP purchase path, filter chips, node selection with details panel
Interactive frontend architecture map — 26 nodes, 37 edges, 6 clusters, critical purchase flow, filter chips, node selection with details panel

replit_log.summary: New Pro provider (rdp.monster) service — getProPlans, getProRegions, createProInstance, deleteProInstance. Gracefully returns [] if RDP_MONSTER_API_KEY not set. Never exposes provider name.
Dual-provider market route — merges Basic (Linode) + Pro (rdp.monster) plans with tier tags, markup applied to both, Pro plans gracefully absent if API key not configured.
Added tier field (enum: basic|pro, default: basic) to createOrderSchema. image is now optional for Pro tier.
Orders list + single order now expose tier field extracted from metadata JSON field (defaults to basic).
Updated MarketData type with tier on plans/regions. Order type gets tier + metadata fields. Shared getDaysLeft + getRegionFlag helpers.
New persistent sidebar shell — logo, nav (Dashboard/Marketplace/Orders), active instance count badge, Clerk UserButton, mobile hamburger drawer.

Full marketplace redesign — tier tabs (All/Basic/Pro), GSAP card hover animations, sticky Order Summary panel, duration slider, region/image pickers, credentials Dialog, crypto coming-soon badge, sign-in Dialog.
Control Panel redesign — animated CountUp stat cards (Active/Total/Expiring), instance rows with tier badges + expiry countdown, empty state CTA, AppShell sidebar.
Orders redesign — search bar, filter chips (All/Active/Pending/Terminated/Failed), expandable order cards with copy-to-clipboard credentials, AlertDialog terminate confirm.
Added AnimatePresence page transitions for /market, /dashboard, /orders. Extracted AppRoutes component. Removed deprecated fallbackRedirectUrl Clerk prop.
Removed deprecated fallbackRedirectUrl prop from ClerkProvider (TypeScript error fix).
Full SEO/meta overhaul: lang=en, og:* tags fixed, og:image, canonical URL, Twitter card, JSON-LD Organization, sitemap link
New sitemap.xml with all public routes
New admin Dev tab — agent activity feed + architecture map iframes

notes: PROTOCOL: Before any edit, check active_claims.replit — skip files claimed by Replit Agent
PROTOCOL: Claim your files in active_claims.commandcode before editing, release when done
PROTOCOL: After each file edit, append to commandcode_log (ts, file, action, summary). Cap at 50.
PROTOCOL: Set last_updated_by to 'commandcode' and last_updated_at after each update
PROTOCOL: If Replit has a file you need claimed, add to conflicts[] and move on
PROTOCOL: Read replit_log before starting to see what Replit recently changed
Cyberise is an RDP marketplace — users buy RDP/VPS servers provisioned on Linode (Basic) or rdp.monster (Pro)
Tier system: Basic = Linode-backed, Pro = rdp.monster-backed. NEVER show provider names to buyers.
Frontend: Vite + React (artifacts/cyberise/), API: Express 5 (artifacts/api-server/)
Auth is handled by Clerk — middleware validates JWT tokens
Database is PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM (lib/db/)
Rate limiting uses Upstash Redis — three presets: market(30/min), order(5/min), strict(10/min)
RDP passwords are AES-encrypted at rest via CryptoJS
Order.metadata Json field stores { tier, proInstanceId } — no DB migration needed for tier
AppShell wraps Market, Dashboard, Orders pages individually — landing page is untouched
RDP_MONSTER_API_KEY env var: when not set, Pro plans gracefully return [] (Pro tab shows coming-soon placeholder)
GSAP installed in @workspace/cyberise — used for plan card hover transforms in Market.tsx
Don't touch lib/db/schema.prisma without coordinating between agents
Deployment target is Vercel — Vite builds frontend, esbuild bundles API
GITHUB: Push to origin is blocked by secret scanning — old commits contain real Stripe key + Vercel PAT in .replit. User must click GitHub unblock URLs OR rewrite history. Both keys must be rotated.
CLERK: Production keys only work on cyberise.org domain — login errors in Replit dev sandbox are EXPECTED, not a bug
CLERK: fallbackRedirectUrl is NOT a valid prop — use signInFallbackRedirectUrl/signUpFallbackRedirectUrl
